summary: A simple static website for '10th Science Academy' with a red-themed header, welcome section, and a button that shows an alert to students.
architectural_notes: Static HTML/CSS website with inline styles and no external dependencies

existing_features.title: Create a header section displaying the title '10th Science Academy' with a bold red background (#d9002c) and white text.

Create a welcome section with the heading 'Welcome to My Website', a subtitle paragraph 'This website is created using HTML.', and a button labeled 'Click Me' that triggers an alert saying 'Hello Students!' when clicked.

Apply a cohesive visual theme using the academy's red (#d9002c) as the primary accent color. Use a clean, academic style with a light gray background, centered layout, clear typography, and consistent use of red for interactive elements like buttons and headings.

Add a 'Subjects' section to the website that displays a list of subjects taught at the 10th Science Academy. Each subject should be displayed as a card or list item with the subject name clearly visible. The section should use the academy's red (#d9002c) accent color and match the existing visual theme (light gray background, centered layout, consistent typography).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a subjects list section to the website
Add a settings/configuration section or page (details to be specified later)
